summary: Iteration 2 testing of GeoCoat two-product restructure (Home + /paint + /primer routes). All backend pytest tests still pass (9/9). Frontend Playwright E2E verified routing, testid presence, copy updates, primer page structure, navigation behavior, contact-form submission with backend persistence verification, and console error absence. All review-request checks pass.

minor.issue: Pre-existing nit from iteration 1: logger reorder note. Per agent_to_agent_context_note the logger reorder is now applied in iteration 1 — confirmed no functional regression. Tests pass.

critical_code_review_comments: TwoSystems.jsx data-testid for system cards uses slug ('paint'/'primer') correctly.

Primer.jsx (~647 lines) is borderline against the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into PrimerHero / PrimerSystem / PrimerPerformance / PrimerApplications / PrimerProcess subcomponents for maintainability.

Contact.jsx still has the iteration-1 conflict: HTML5 `required` attrs + a manual JS toast.error check (manual toast remains unreachable). Functionally safe but redundant. Pick one validation strategy.
App.js routing is minimal (no 404/NotFound route). Recommend adding a catch-all <Route path="*" ...> fallback for unknown URLs.
Home/Landing/Primer all reuse the same Contact section (good DRY). Verified successful submissions from /primer persist to the same /api/contact collection.
test_credentials: N/A — public landing site, no auth.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/contact created TEST_PrimerSubmit_<ts> rows in MongoDB `contacts` while exercising the /primer form. Cleanup hint: db.contacts.deleteMany({name: /^TEST_/}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Routes: / (Home with data-testid='home-page'), /paint (Landing with data-testid='landing-page'), /primer (Primer with data-testid='primer-page'). Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_geocoat_api.py. NOTE about Playwright: do NOT rely on page.is_visible() for these pages — Framer-motion + lenis smooth scroll cause sporadic false negatives. Use locator.count() + bounding_box() for presence/visibility checks. Also note inner_text('body') uppercases CSS-text-transform content (e.g. 'CORE CHEMISTRY' in DOM even though JSX is 'Core Chemistry'); match the displayed form when asserting on body text.

verified_checklist.paint_service_life_25yr: PASS - hero-stat-25+ yr present, '60+ yr' absent
verified_checklist.about_core_chemistry: PASS - About overline reads 'Core Chemistry' (rendered uppercase via CSS); 'Studio Note 01' absent
verified_checklist.paint_hero_3d_and_text: PASS - hero-3d-canvas renders; 'Paint that becomes the wall.' visible in screenshot (text is on two lines)
verified_checklist.primer_three_layers: PASS - primer-layer-01/02/03 present with Zinc-Rich Primer / Micaceous Iron Oxide / Polyurethane Topcoat
verified_checklist.primer_contact_form_submit: PASS - submission shows success toast ('Thank you. A GeoCoat specialist will be in touch within 24 hours.') and row persists; verified via GET /api/contact
verified_checklist.no_console_errors: PASS - 0 console/page errors on Home, Paint, Primer full loads
